## Problem

What workflow is currently painful?

## Proposed Improvement

What would you like WaveDeck to do?

## Why It Matters

Who benefits and how?

## Notes

Keep requests aligned with a local-first PowerPoint workflow. If the request touches private decks or camera behavior, describe the use case without exposing sensitive material.
